title: The Unexpected Visitor
content: On a quiet Sunday afternoon, Olivia planned to spend the entire day reading and relaxing at home. She was still wearing comfortable clothes and drinking tea when someone knocked on the door unexpectedly. To her surprise, it was her cousin Daniel, who was visiting the city for work. They had not seen each other in almost three years. Olivia immediately invited him inside, and they spent hours talking about family, travel, and old memories from childhood. Later, they ordered food and watched an old comedy movie together. Olivia’s peaceful day did not go as planned, but the unexpected visit ended up becoming one of the best parts of her month.
